candidates.why: Direct match for total current assets.
Component of current assets, not the total.

Balancing/subtotal artifact, inferior to explicit total.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at end of period
candidates.why: Cash flow statement ending balance agrees numerically, but balance sheet is preferred.

variables.notes: Used the balance sheet cash balance as requested.

candidates.why: Direct match for total current liabilities.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total current liabilities line.

candidates.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases
candidates.why: Direct match to current portion of debt and explicitly excludes capitalized leases, which fits baseline STD definition well.
Could be a current debt total, but may include lease liabilities given coexistence of separate lease rows in some periods; less clean than the explicit excluding-leases line.

candidates.row_label: Interest bearing liabilities to credit institutions
candidates.why: May represent borrowings, but label is not explicitly current in the shown line and could overlap with other debt lines.

final_choice.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases

variables.notes: Priority 1 is the clean excluding-leases line. Added 'Current interest-bearing liabilities' as fallback for years where the explicit excluding-leases line is absent. Manual review needed because 'Current interest-bearing liabilities' may include lease liabilities in some periods, and there is risk of definition inconsistency across years. Do not sum both in the same year if they overlap.

candidates.why: Direct match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.

variables.notes: Direct tax payable/current tax liabilities line.

candidates.why: Best available reported total for property, plant and equipment / tangible fixed assets; preferable to lease-specific or balancing lines.
Could represent total tangible assets, but appears to be a balancing/artifact line and has poor data presence.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Gross
candidates.why: Lease-specific gross ROU assets, not baseline total PPE.

variables.notes: Chosen outside the shortlist because it is the clearest total tangible asset/PPE-type line and is preferable to lease-specific or balancing rows.
Selected the explicit total assets line.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities Investment activities
candidates.why: Despite the merged/awkward header text, the values reconcile as net cash from operating activities and precede investing cash flow rows.

final_choice.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities Investment activities

variables.notes: This row label appears concatenated with the next section header, but semantically and numerically it is the operating cash flow total.
